title: Foundations of ML
blurb: Build the mental model for models, weights, training, tokens, embeddings, attention, and inference.

title: Working with Agents
blurb: Learn the agent loop, tool use, context discipline, orchestration, evaluation, and failure modes.

title: Vibe Coding
blurb: Use coding models as fast collaborators while keeping design, review, tests, and acceptance criteria human-owned.

title: Evaluating AI Honestly
blurb: Measure AI systems with separation of roles, pre-registered claims, calibrated uncertainty, and a not-measured ledger.

title: LLM Research and the Frontier
blurb: Track frontier concepts with source discipline: transformers, alignment, interpretability, evals, and test-time compute.
